description_long: This bungalow features a striking modern design with two parallel rectangular volumes, each topped with a bold, geometric black-and-white striped roof. The front and rear facades are dominated by large glass panels, providing clear views into the interior and allowing natural light to flood the living spaces. The roofs are angled and partially open, creating a dynamic interplay of light and shadow across the structure. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, white material, contrasting sharply with the dark roof pattern. The entryways are recessed and framed by glass, with minimal visible ornamentation, emphasizing the clean lines and contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure sits on a dark base, further highlighting the crisp geometry and modernist style.
description: A modern, dual-volume bungalow with bold black-and-white striped angled roofs and large glass facades, featuring clean lines and a striking geometric aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing two glass-fronted volumes with angled, striped roofs and visible interior spaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white walls and the dramatic black-and-white roof pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view with large glass panels and the continuation of the striped roof design, revealing interior details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the white exterior walls and the angular, patterned roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: large front and rear glass panels, minimal side windows
